add option to not track in tracking category

revision.text: {{Hatnote|<!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}|<!-- -->This {{namespace detect|main=article|category=category|other=page}} is about {{{1}}}.  }}<!-- -->For {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|other uses}}, see {{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[{{{3}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.<!-- -->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and||<!-- "and" is a special word, don't output "For and, ..." -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|1|other uses|{{{4}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{6|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{6}}}|1|other uses|{{{6}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{8|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{8}}}|1|other uses|{{{8}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{_nocat|}}}||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|A{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|3}}|is |[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|B{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: TESTED edit on the [[/sandbox]] that allows template to render a "This section..." wording instead of a "This page/category/article..." wording without breaking any currently-existing transcluded templates - please see the [[/testcases]] subpage
revision.text: {{Hatnote|<!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}|<!-- -->This {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|{{namespace detect|main=article|category=category|other=page}}}} is about {{{1}}}.  }}<!-- -->For {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|other uses}}, see {{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[{{{3}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.<!-- -->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and||<!-- "and" is a special word, don't output "For and, ..." -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|1|other uses|{{{4}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{6|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{6}}}|1|other uses|{{{6}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{8|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{8}}}|1|other uses|{{{8}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{_nocat|}}}||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|A{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|3}}|is |[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|B{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Inherit formatting and style from dablink template
protected edit requested, see talk
add interwiki link per request on talk page
made change per talk request
display "this page..." outside ns:0, per editprotected
improve code readability
refactor per talkpage edit request. Adds support for "and" as used by {{otheruses6}} and {{otheruses8}}
replace links with [[Template:(D)]] for intentional links to disambiguation pages; tested in Sandbox
Tracking for first two empty, but third is not, probably replacable by {{other uses|...}} and {{about|is a ...}}, which is just wrong :)
add option to not track in tracking category
Display "This category is about" for Category-namespace pages, per talk request
revision.text: {{Hatnote|<!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}|<!-- -->This {{namespace detect|main=article|category=category|other=page}} is about {{{1}}}.  }}<!-- -->For {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|other uses}}, see {{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[{{{3}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.<!-- -->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and||<!-- "and" is a special word, don't output "For and, ..." -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|1|other uses|{{{4}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{6|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{6}}}|1|other uses|{{{6}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{8|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{8}}}|1|other uses|{{{8}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{_nocat|}}}||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|A{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|3}}|is |[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|B{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: TESTED edit on the [[/sandbox]] that allows template to render a "This section..." wording instead of a "This page/category/article..." wording without breaking any currently-existing transcluded templates - please see the [[/testcases]] subpage

add option to not track in tracking category
Display "This category is about" for Category-namespace pages, per talk request
revision.text: {{Hatnote|<!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}|<!-- -->This {{namespace detect|main=article|category=category|other=page}} is about {{{1}}}.  }}<!-- -->For {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|other uses}}, see {{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[{{{3}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.<!-- -->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and||<!-- "and" is a special word, don't output "For and, ..." -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|1|other uses|{{{4}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{6|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{6}}}|1|other uses|{{{6}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{8|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{8}}}|1|other uses|{{{8}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{_nocat|}}}||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|A{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|3}}|is |[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|B{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: TESTED edit on the [[/sandbox]] that allows template to render a "This section..." wording instead of a "This page/category/article..." wording without breaking any currently-existing transcluded templates - please see the [[/testcases]] subpage
revision.text: {{Hatnote|<!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}}|<!-- -->This {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|{{namespace detect|main=article|category=category|other=page}}}} is about {{{1}}}.  }}<!-- -->For {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|other uses}}, see {{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[{{{3}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.<!-- -->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|and||<!-- "and" is a special word, don't output "For and, ..." -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{4}}}|1|other uses|{{{4}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{5|}}}|[[{{{5}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{6|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{6|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{6}}}|1|other uses|{{{6}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{7|}}}|[[{{{7}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and| and {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}}}|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{8|}}}|<!-- -->{{#ifeq:{{{8|}}}|and||<!-- -->  For {{#ifeq:{{{8}}}|1|other uses|{{{8}}}}}, see {{#if:{{{9|}}}|[[{{{9}}}]]|[[{{PAGENAME}} (disambiguation)]]}}.}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{_nocat|}}}||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{2|}}}||{{#if:{{{3|}}}|[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|A{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|3}}|is |[[Category:Hatnote templates using unusual parameters|B{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
